# Engineering Accountability In Public Sector AI

This note represents the imported audio file
`research/hmrc-beyond-hype/import/Engineering_Accountability_in_Public_Sector_AI.m4a` in the narrative pack.

## Narrative Use

Use this dialogue as the accountability and assurance strand: generated output is useful only when the team can show evidence, source grounding, review, and ownership.
